pi_items.source: task.json description, setup_task.sh directory creation, and export_result.sh evaluation script
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly checking (csv_rows >= 20 and new_images >= 20)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a completely synthetic CoppeliaSim environment and requires the programmatic generation of a visual dataset from scratch. The expected output directory is verified as '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dataset' via the setup and export scripts. The verifier logic strictly enforces the generation of at least 20 images and matching metadata CSV rows.
